---
title: "Case Studies"
---

ESS rewards **named, specific** examples. This is where you collect them — one
short, structured entry per case, tagged by topic so they're easy to find at
revision time.

## Template for a new case study

Copy this block for each case:

> ### *Name of the case (place + year)*
> **Topic links:** *e.g. 3.3 Conservation, 8.1 Human populations*
> **What happened:** *one or two sentences*
> **Causes:** *bullet points*
> **Impacts:** *environmental, social, economic*
> **Management / response:** *what was done, and how well it worked*

## Example

> ### Costa Rica Payments for Ecosystem Services (1997– )
> **Topic links:** 3.3 Conservation & regeneration, 7.1 Natural resources
> **What happened:** Costa Rica began paying landowners to conserve and restore forest.
> **Causes:** High deforestation rates in the late 20th century.
> **Impacts:** Forest cover recovered substantially; ecotourism grew.
> **Management / response:** A national fund financed by fuel taxes and international support.

*(Check the figures and details against current sources before publishing.)*
